name: get_calendar
description: Returns today's scheduled meetings — company names, times, contact names, and call types. Always call this first at session start.

name: get_account
description: Returns a unified account view from Salesforce, Outreach, and Slack: ARR, plan tier, deal stage, renewal date, account notes, Outreach engagement stats, and recent internal Slack mentions from teammates. Call this first when briefing any account.

name: get_gong
description: Returns data from the last Gong call: summary, objections with severity, next steps, competitive mentions, talk-time ratio, and sentiment. Call this alongside get_account for a full brief.

name: get_slack_mentions
description: Returns recent internal Slack mentions of this company from teammates. Surfaces intel that doesn't live in Salesforce — competitive sightings, warm intros, escalations.

name: get_outreach
description: Returns Outreach.io sequence engagement: open rate, reply rate, emails sent, last touch type, and next step in sequence. Use to tell the rep whether the prospect has been warm or going cold.

name: get_wiki_playbook
description: Returns the internal sales wiki playbook for this company: recommended talk track, competitive battle card responses, and discovery questions.

name: get_patterns
description: Analyzes all of today's meetings and returns cross-call patterns: competitors mentioned in multiple accounts, shared objection categories, and recommended proactive actions. Call this after briefing 2+ accounts.

name: draft_followup
description: Drafts a Slack DM the rep can send. action_type options: 'competitive_positioning_note' (team Slack about a competitor), 'next_steps_summary' (recap for the prospect), 'intro_request' (warm intro ask).

company.description: Company name relevant to the follow-up. Case-insensitive.
